description: 55M current smoker with HTN, ASCVD 18.2%. Grade B statin initiation is the primary action.

actions.label: Initiate moderate-intensity statin therapy
actions.rationale: USPSTF Grade B recommendation: adults 40-75 with >= 1 CVD risk factor and 10-year ASCVD risk >= 10% should be started on a statin for primary prevention. Patient has HTN, current smoking, and ASCVD 18.2%.

actions.label: Smoking cessation counseling and pharmacotherapy
actions.rationale: Current daily smoker. Smoking is a modifiable CVD risk factor. Cessation reduces ASCVD risk substantially.

actions.label: Optimize blood pressure management
actions.rationale: BP 148/92 mmHg is above target. HTN is an independent CVD risk factor and ASCVD calculator input. No current antihypertensive on medication list.

contraindications.label: High-intensity statin therapy
contraindications.rationale: USPSTF 2022 recommends moderate-intensity for primary prevention in this risk band. High-intensity is ACC/AHA secondary prevention territory.
